The podcast is a discussion of the past week’s news about Star Atlas. If you are interested in being on the podcast, please contact us. We are launching a Star Atlas merch store. summary.current_validity_warning: Summaries, roadmaps, operational details, and attributed statements require reconciliation with primary and later sources.

article_text:
Welcome to the Star Atlas weekly recap from the Intergalactic Herald. Below is what happened with Star Atlas this past week.
We are looking for guests to be on our podcast. The podcast is a discussion of the past week’s news about Star Atlas. If you are interested in being on the podcast, please contact us.
We are launching a Star Atlas merch store. Please check it out at Intergalactic Gear.
We are creating a “non-guild” guild. If you are interested in learning more, please go to Intergalactic Coalition.
Star Atlas Chatter #12 – STATS, Modules & MORE!
RahMega posted a video recapping the past week of Star Atlas information.
STAR ATLAS #196 SAGE LABS LOBBY by Kenny Dovahkiin & GUNSSS
MetaVerse Explorer posted a video of Star Atlas updates.
Metaverse Nomads #110 Star Atlas w/ Virtuwul
Metaverse Nomads posted their weekly Star Atlas livestream.
Star Atlas Sage Labs Showdown
Beyond the Horizon posted a video about a showdown with Atlas Theory.
Star Atlas Aephia Fleet Building Tools
Beyond the Horizon posted a video looking at a Star Atlas fleet building tool.
WEEKLY STAR ATLAS NEWSLETTER #95
Aephia posted their weekly Star Atlas newsletter.
3D Printed BYOS EARP
Engima 42 posted a video about his latest Star Atlas 3D model for sale.
Star Atlas – SAGE Labs Playtesting Has Begun!!
Atlas Theory posted a video about playtesting of SAGE Labs.
What Star Atlas Is Doing Differently
Duyo posted a video about what Star Atlas is doing differently.
The Atlas Brew #78
Star Atlas TV posted a video replay of the latest Atlas Brew.
STAR ATLAS #197 The War Just Started (Serious)
MetaVerse Explorer posted a video looking at a SAGE Labs tool.
Star Atlas – First Look at SAGE Labs Gameplay!!
Atlas Theory posted a video look at the first gameplay of SAGE Labs.
2023/09/06 Star Atlas Brew #78 – Sage Labs Tips – TLDR
TLDR 3.0 posted a video recapping the latest Atlas Brew.
Star Atlas – SAGE Labs Sneak Peek
Siggy tweeted a sneak peek of SAGE Labs.
